target.description: The product or company entering the market (e.g., 'RouteForge field service platform')

market.description: The market or category being entered, if different from what upstream research covers

constraints.description: Founder constraints: bootstrapped, funded, team size, budget range, timeline pressure

description: Go-to-market strategy from research — beachhead selection with evidence, phased expansion, pricing strategy, founding customer program, channel strategy, risk register. Depends on websearch+competitors+positioning upstream.
usage: go to market, GTM strategy, market entry, beachhead, launch strategy, how to enter market, first customers, go-to-market plan
